layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and altcoins are bleeding — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a state of fear, with most alternative coins (altcoins) dropping heavily over the past week. Bitcoin is holding up relatively well, which is sucking capital away from smaller coins. None of the coins on our watchlist present a clean, high-confidence entry — they're either crashing with no bottom in sight, or have already bounced and may be extended. The smartest move is to sit tight and wait for a clearer setup.
layman_action: Do not buy anything right now. Keep your cash ready. When fear peaks and a strong coin shows a clear bounce off support with rising volume, that will be the time to strike. Watch ZRO and ETH-related plays over the next few days.
expert_reasoning: Every swing candidate has significant headwinds: BTC dominance at 56.3% is crushing alts, Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but still deep in fear territory, and nearly all candidates are below their major moving averages. ZRO stands out with RSI at 31 (approaching oversold — a reliable signal per our track record) and an exceptional 16.5x risk/reward at the $0.90 support level, but the chart bias is -0.70 (bearish) with no bullish reversal candle confirmed. LAB and GRASS had sharp dips (-90% and -30% respectively) but both show bearish engulfing patterns suggesting more downside. ETHFI has the only bullish chart (+0.60) but has already rallied 13.5% in 5 days and sits near resistance at $0.40 with terrible R/R of 0.11x. The disciplined move is to wait for ZRO to confirm a bounce off $0.90 or for broader market fear to capitulate.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% continues to drain capital from altcoins — alts could fall further even if BTC holds
Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but hasn't capitulated — could dip lower triggering another leg down
No candidate shows confirmed bullish reversal patterns — entering now risks catching a falling knife
watch_list: ZRO price action at $0.90 support — a hammer or morning star here with volume would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index — a drop to sub-20 extreme fear followed by sharp reversal would signal capitulation
BTC holding above $64,000 — if BTC breaks down, all alt setups are invalidated
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear regime (F&G 26) with BTC dominance at 56.3%, creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. BTC is stable around $64K but alts are bleeding, and no clear reversal signals have emerged yet.
context_banner: Market fear is improving but altcoin charts remain broken — discipline demands waiting for confirmed reversal setups before deploying capital.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (improving from 23) suggests fear is easing but hasn't bottomed — our most reliable signal (75% win rate) works best at extremes, and we're not there yet.
ZRO RSI at 31 is approaching oversold territory (our second most reliable signal at 67% win rate), but needs to dip below 30 or show a reversal candle for confirmation.
ETH derivatives reset and DePIN/gaming rebound coverage suggests sector rotation may be starting, which could eventually benefit infrastructure plays like ZRO.
No volume breakout signals detected across any candidates — all moves lack conviction, reinforcing the HOLD decision.
BTC dominance at 56.3% signals capital is flowing to safety, making altcoin entries premature until dominance shows signs of peaking.
